name: lottery-educator
description: Educational lottery simulator to teach users about the unlikeliness of winning

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,engine,stats,email,metrics,frontend -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev --workspace=backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/game-engine" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/statistics" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/email-service" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/metrics-service" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n gateway,engine,stats,email,metrics -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace=backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/game-engine" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/statistics" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/email-service" "npm run dev --workspace=backend/metrics-service"

author: CodingAltar
